display.preferencesIntro: How dates and times appear in history tables and charts on this browser.

load_shedding.restore_all_when_grid_present: Restore all tiers when grid present
load_shedding.name: Tier name

temperature.use_month_fallback: Use monthly fallback when sensor missing

entities.max_grid_charge_current: Max grid charge current (normalized to A)

capabilities.max_grid_charge_current: Max grid charge current (normalized to A)

battery.capacity_kwh: Usable battery energy capacity. Used for autonomy, reserve, and ETA calculations.
battery.nominal_voltage: Nominal pack voltage used to convert max grid charge current (amps) to watts in the MPC optimizer.
battery.min_soc_floor: Lowest SOC the optimizer will target or allow writes toward.
battery.max_soc_ceiling: Highest SOC cap used in planning, bound checks, and charge ETA.
battery.round_trip_efficiency: Round-trip efficiency (0–1). Accounts for losses when charging and discharging.

reserve.critical_load_w: الحمل الأساسي للدوائر الحرجة (ثلاجة، إضاءة، اتصالات). يمكن للأرضية التكيفية الرفع فوقه باستخدام متوسط الحمل الأخير حسب الأولويات.
reserve.min_autonomy_hours: ساعات الحمل الحرج الفعال التي يجب أن تغطيها البطارية دون شمس أو شبكة.
reserve.solar_bridge_buffer_pct: هامش SOC إضافي بينما يُتوقع شمس قريبًا، قبل النزول للاحتياطي العميق.
reserve.cloudy_extra_buffer_pct: هامش احتياطي إضافي في الأيام الغائمة عندما يكون الإنتاج غير مؤكد.
reserve.adaptive_load_enabled: عند التفعيل: أرضية الاستقلالية وجسر الشمس يستخدمان متوسطًا مُنعَّمًا (وليس عينة لحظية فقط)، معدَّلًا بترتيب الأولويات. الإشارة = max(متوسط حمل المنزل، متوسط تفريغ البطارية) ليشمل خسائر التحويل دون حساب مزدوج.
reserve.adaptive_load_window_minutes: دقائق القياس المستخدمة لمتوسط حمل المنزل / التفريغ في الأرضية التكيفية.
reserve.adaptive_load_cap_w: سقف اختياري للواط الحرج الفعال (الافتراضي: 3× الحمل الحرج) حتى لا يفرض حمل عالق 100٪ SOC.

site.timezone: IANA timezone for site-local day boundaries (forecasts, grid ramp, load profiles, and dashboard display). Choose Auto to detect from site coordinates.
site.latitude: Site latitude for solar and weather forecasts (decimal degrees).
site.longitude: Site longitude for solar and weather forecasts (decimal degrees).

forecast.provider: Solar forecast source: Open-Meteo (free) or Solcast (API key required via environment).
forecast.training_days: Days of telemetry history used to train load bias and profile models.
forecast.min_load_fraction: Floor on predicted load as a fraction of recent peak (avoids near-zero forecasts).

control.loop_interval_seconds: How often the orchestrator reads telemetry and recomputes decisions.
control.forecast_interval_minutes: How often solar/load forecasts are refreshed.
control.min_write_interval_seconds: Minimum time between inverter writes to avoid spamming Home Assistant. When this exceeds the control loop interval, ramp steps may take multiple cycles to apply.
control.enforce_hard_bounds: When enabled, reject grid charge current writes outside 0–max_grid_charge_a instead of silently clamping.
control.ha_stale_after_seconds: Treat telemetry as stale after this many seconds without fresh HA updates.

fail_safe.heartbeat_entity: input_datetime helper pulsed each control cycle (default: input_datetime.solar_optimizer_heartbeat from the HA fail-safe package).
fail_safe.heartbeat_enabled: When enabled and an entity is set, pulse the heartbeat each control cycle.
fail_safe.shutdown_failsafe_enabled: On graceful shutdown, enable grid charge at max current before exiting.

load_shedding.enabled: Turn on automatic shedding of discretionary loads when SOC is low.
load_shedding.restore_all_when_grid_present: When grid is detected, turn all shed tiers back on (battery no longer at risk).
load_shedding.name: Logical name for this tier (shown in history and decision logs).
load_shedding.switches: Home Assistant switch or input_boolean entities to turn off when shedding this tier.
load_shedding.shed_below_soc: Turn entities off when battery SOC drops below this value.
load_shedding.restore_above_soc: Turn entities back on when SOC rises above this value (hysteresis prevents flapping).
load_shedding.priority: Shed order: lower numbers shed first; higher numbers are kept longer.
load_shedding.restore_enabled: When enabled, turn this tier back on when SOC rises above restore threshold.
load_shedding.restore_on_grid: When enabled, restore this tier when grid is detected (if global grid restore is on).

grid_charge.enabled: When off, the optimizer does not plan or write grid-charge commands. Independent of load shedding.
grid_charge.ramp_enabled: When enabled, grid charge current ramps up/down using the factor cap chain. When off, uses legacy max-or-off charging.
grid_charge.max_grid_charge_a: Ceiling for grid charge current in amps. The ramp engine writes up to this value via the max grid charge current entity.
grid_charge.min_grid_charge_a: Minimum amps when grid charge is enabled. If the cap chain yields a value below this (but above off threshold), it is bumped up to avoid flickering at very low currents.
grid_charge.ramp_step_a: Maximum change in grid charge amps per control cycle.
grid_charge.off_threshold_a: If the cap chain result is below this value, grid charge is disabled.
grid_charge.next_solar_horizon_hours: Hours ahead to look for imminent solar when evaluating the next solar window factor.
grid_charge.max_continuous_present_minutes: نافذة الفرصة النموذجية/القصوى عند ظهور الشبكة (~ساعتين).
grid_charge.grid_window_safety_factor: تخفيض النافذة الموثوقة (0.75 → المغادرة قبل النهاية المقدّرة).
grid_charge.max_outage_ignore_minutes: الانقطاعات ≤ هذه المدة تبقى ضمن فرصة واحدة (وميض).
grid_charge.min_opportunity_present_minutes: الجزر المدمجة القصيرة جداً تُتجاهل في متوسط التاريخ.
grid_charge.max_grid_import_w: سقف استيراد الموقع/المرفق بالواط (اختياري). فارغ = بلا سقف إضافي.
grid_charge.max_grid_import_entity: مستشعر HA لقدرة الاستيراد. W أو kW×1000. يتجاوز الحقل اليدوي عند القراءة.

engine.enabled: When off, reserve targets, MPC, and forecast refresh are skipped. Load shedding and grid charge can still run independently.
engine.mode: Rules: fast heuristics. MPC: optimization over the forecast horizon (needs PuLP). Charge and discharge power bounds both use max_grid_charge_a × nominal_voltage.
engine.mpc_horizon_hours: How many hours ahead the MPC engine plans when mode is MPC.

ha.base_url: Home Assistant base URL, e.g. http://homeassistant.local:8123
ha.token: Long-lived access token with rights to read entities and call services.
ha.verify_ssl: Verify TLS certificates when connecting to Home Assistant over HTTPS.

temperature.enabled: Model heating/cooling load from outdoor temperature in the forecast.
temperature.ha_entity: Optional HA temperature sensor to bias-correct outdoor forecast readings. Uses unit_of_measurement (°C or °F→°C).
temperature.hdd_base_c: Heating degree-day base: outdoor temps below this add heating load.
temperature.cdd_base_c: Cooling degree-day base: outdoor temps above this add cooling load.
temperature.use_month_fallback: Use monthly average temperature when the outdoor sensor is unavailable.
temperature.min_load_fraction: Minimum HVAC-related load as a fraction of the learned profile.
temperature.training_days: Days of history used to fit the temperature load model.

pv.name: Label for this PV array (informational; used in logs and UI).
pv.kwp: Peak DC capacity of the array in kilowatts-peak.
pv.tilt: Panel tilt from horizontal in degrees (0 = flat, 90 = vertical).
pv.azimuth: Compass direction panels face: 180° = south (northern hemisphere).

security.api_token: Must match the server API_TOKEN. Stored only in this browser for authorized writes.

entities.grid_present: Binary sensor that is on when utility grid is connected to the inverter.
entities.battery_soc: Sensor reporting battery state of charge. Uses HA unit_of_measurement; stored as %.
entities.battery_voltage: Battery voltage sensor used for validation and display.
entities.battery_current: Battery current sensor (charge/discharge sign per your inverter).
entities.battery_power: Battery power sensor. Uses HA unit_of_measurement (W or kW×1000); stored as watts (positive = charging). Enable “Invert battery power sign” in Settings if your inverter reports the opposite.
entities.battery_temp: Battery temperature. Uses HA unit_of_measurement (°C or °F→°C) for history charts and optional derating.
entities.pv_power: Total PV production power from the inverter or meter. Uses HA unit_of_measurement (W or kW×1000); stored as watts.
entities.load_power: House load power seen by the inverter or main meter. Uses HA unit_of_measurement (W or kW×1000); stored as watts.
entities.grid_power: Grid import/export power if exposed by your integration. Uses HA unit_of_measurement (W or kW×1000); stored as watts.
entities.grid_charge_enable: Switch or select that enables grid charging on the inverter.
entities.max_grid_charge_current: Entity to limit current drawn from the grid for charging. Uses HA unit_of_measurement (A or mA→A); the only charge-current write the optimizer uses.

priorities.resilience: Higher rank: larger solar-bridge reserve buffers, stronger blackout-risk response, and more defensive planning when the grid is present.
priorities.savings: Higher rank: more opportunistic grid charging when the grid is available and slightly leaner bridge buffers. Does not model electricity tariffs or time-of-use rates.
priorities.self_sufficiency: Higher rank: stronger solar-trim factors in the grid-charge ramp and higher MPC penalty on curtailed PV — prefers using solar over grid top-up.

overrides.mode: Shadow logs decisions without writing to HA. Live applies inverter and shed commands.
overrides.engine: Pause stops the control loop. Resume restarts automatic decisions.
overrides.grid_charge: Force on pauses automatic control and charges at max safe current. Auto or Running returns to optimizer control.
overrides.load_shedding: Force off pauses automatic control and turns off all shed tier devices. Auto or Running returns to optimizer control.
overrides.pin_reserve: Override the computed target reserve SOC (%) until cleared or changed.
overrides.run_cycle: Immediately run one decision cycle (forecast + plan + optional writes).
overrides.refresh_forecast: Pull a fresh solar/load forecast without waiting for the scheduler.
overrides.clear_overrides: Remove pause, reserve pin, force charge, and other temporary overrides.
overrides.kill_switch: Emergency: enable grid charge at max current, pause engine, restore shed switches.

status.solar: Current PV production from your mapped sensor.
status.load: House load power drawn from the inverter or main meter.
status.battery: State of charge and charge/discharge power (+ = charging).
status.grid: Whether utility grid is present, import/export power, and planned grid charge current.
status.grid_charge: Planned max grid charge current from the latest decision cycle.
status.reserve: Target SOC the optimizer is defending right now.
status.risk: Overall reserve risk level from the latest decision.
status.outdoor: Outdoor temperature from forecast bias sensor or telemetry.

sections.battery: Physical battery limits used by forecasting and the decision engine.
sections.reserve: How much energy to hold back for outages and critical loads.
sections.forecast: Location, provider, and training settings for solar and load prediction.
sections.control: Timing and safety limits for the control loop and HA writes.
sections.fail_safe: Heartbeat for HA watchdog automation and grid-charge-at-max on shutdown.
sections.load_shedding: Optional tiers of switches to shed when SOC is low.
sections.grid_charge: Cap-chain factors that limit grid charge current each cycle (engine uses the lowest ceiling).
sections.engine: Rules vs MPC mode, plus reorderable optimization priorities (resilience, savings, self-sufficiency).
sections.ha: Connection settings for reading sensors and writing inverter controls.
sections.inverter: Map logical capabilities to your Home Assistant entity IDs.
sections.pv_arrays: Each array is forecast separately using tilt, azimuth, and peak power.
sections.temperature: Optional heating/cooling load model from outdoor temperature.
sections.mcp: مستوى تحكم MCP اختياري لوكلاء الذكاء الاصطناعي — الحالة والإرشاد (يُكوَّن عبر البيئة، وليس هذا الملف).

app.viewAsViewerTooltip: See the dashboard as a viewer
app.updateInProgressTitle: Software update in progress — open Settings
app.updateAvailableTitle: A newer release is available — open Settings

status.staleTelemetry: Telemetry is stale{age} — shedding and grid actions use conservative defaults.

decision.title: القرار والمبرر
decision.shadowMode: وضع الظل: تُسجَّل الإجراءات دون كتابتها على العاكس.

grid.title: Grid (reactive — not predicted)
grid.note: These figures are display-only. The optimizer never predicts the grid; it grabs it opportunistically whenever it appears.

forecast.title: Forecast (48h)
forecast.engineInactive: Forecast refresh is inactive while optimization is disabled. Enable Engine in Settings or use shed-only advisory on the Load shedding tab.
forecast.noForecastViewer: No forecast yet. Ask an admin to configure site location and PV arrays in Settings.
forecast.noForecastAdmin: No forecast yet. Set your site latitude/longitude and panels in the Settings tab.

history.title: السجل
history.samePlan: نفس الخطة كال دورة السابقة (رأس فقط).
history.noShed: No shed switch writes recorded yet.
history.noGrid: No grid transitions in this window.

overrides.title: Controls & overrides
overrides.enginePaused: All subsystems paused — no inverter or shed writes until resumed.
overrides.gridChargeForced: Grid charge forced on at max current (automation paused).
overrides.shedForced: Load shedding forced off (all tier devices off; automation paused).
overrides.killConfirm: Engage KILL SWITCH? This enables grid charge at max current, pauses the engine, and restores shed tiers.
overrides.toastKillSuccess: Kill switch engaged; grid charge at max current.

loadShedding.title: تخفيف الأحمال
loadShedding.viewerNote: Load shedding configuration changes require an admin.
loadShedding.intro: Companions on the same Home Assistant device are discovered automatically (climate, select, etc.), snapshotted when shedding, and reapplied on restore. Devices that were off before shedding are never turned on.
loadShedding.tiersIntro: Tiers — lowest priority sheds first. All entities in a tier shed and restore together.
loadShedding.entitiesConnected: Start typing to pick from your Home Assistant entities.
loadShedding.entitiesDisconnected: Home Assistant not connected — set the connection in Settings and
loadShedding.presetIntro: Use when you only need SOC-based load shedding. Grid-charge write entities are not required.
loadShedding.presetRequirements: Requires inverter read sensors (SOC, grid presence) and tier switch entities.
loadShedding.revertConfirm: Revert load shedding settings to last saved file?
loadShedding.validationTierEntities: Tier "{name}": at least one shed entity is required.
loadShedding.unsavedWarning: You have unsaved load shedding changes.
loadShedding.wizardStep1: Enable load shedding above, then add your first tier.

settings.title: الإعدادات
settings.downgradeWarning: If you saved config on a newer release, downgrading may ignore newer settings keys or use defaults for them.
settings.invertBatteryHelp: Enable if your inverter reports positive power when discharging. Does not change stored history.
settings.apiTokenPlaceholder: Bearer token (stored in this browser only)
settings.revertConfirm: Discard all UI overrides and revert to base defaults?
settings.toastImportModelSuccess: Model imported; ML retrain paused until you click Retrain from telemetry.
settings.insufficientTelemetry: insufficient telemetry history or ML not enabled
settings.updateTimeout: Update in progress but the service did not respond in time. Use Restore below if needed.
settings.checkUpdatesFailed: Could not check for updates right now.
settings.updateStartedTimeout: Update started but the service did not respond in time. Use Restore below to recover from the pre-install backup.
settings.restoreTimeout: Restore started but the service did not respond in time. Check container logs on the host.
settings.restoreHint: The service did not respond after the last install attempt. Restore the pre-install backup to recover.
settings.includePrereleasesHelp: Show pre-release versions in the list. Beta installs use an explicit image tag and do not trigger update notifications.
settings.betaInstallConfirm: This is a pre-release build and may be less stable than a final release.
settings.onLatest: You are on the latest release.
settings.haSupervisorNote: App updates are managed in Home Assistant → Settings → Apps. Enable Pre-release updates in this app's configuration to check for beta/RC builds.
settings.proxmoxNote: On Proxmox you can also run update inside the LXC for host-side upgrades.
settings.haControlsIntro: Credentials Solar uses to read entities and write inverter commands.
settings.haControlsAddonStatus: Connected via Supervisor — no URL or token needed.
settings.haEnvTokenHint: قد تضبط التثبيتات بدون واجهة HA_BASE_URL و HA_TOKEN في البيئة بدلاً من IndieAuth.
settings.haIntegrationIntro: Install the HACS integration; use a pairing code during setup (fail-safe and update entity).
settings.haIntegrationAddonNote: On Home Assistant OS, the integration can use Supervisor discovery — pairing is only needed for remote or legacy setups.
settings.haWsStatusBanned: Home Assistant rejected the connection (HTTP 403 / IP ban). Clear ip_bans.yaml, fix credentials, then Retry.
settings.haWsStatusAuth: رفض Home Assistant رمز الوصول. أعد تفويض IndieAuth أو عيّن HA_TOKEN، ثم أعد المحاولة.
settings.haWsStatusCircuit: Connection paused to avoid IP bans. Fix credentials or clear the ban, then Retry.
settings.haWsStatusTransient: Home Assistant unreachable — retrying with backoff.
settings.haWsRetryOk: Retry requested — Solar will reconnect shortly.
settings.pairIntro: Generate a one-time code so the Home Assistant custom integration can connect.
settings.pairHint: Enter the code in Home Assistant within about 10 minutes. Revoke clients below if a device is lost or replaced.
settings.pairCodeIssued: Pairing code ready — enter it in Home Assistant.
settings.haOauthIntro: فوّض Solar لاستدعاء واجهات برمجة Home Assistant. مفضّل للتثبيتات المستقلة.
settings.haOauthDisconnectedStatus: غير متصل عبر IndieAuth (قد يظل HA_TOKEN من البيئة ساريًا).
settings.haOauthWindowOpened: Authorization window opened — complete login in Home Assistant.
settings.apiSecurityIntro: When the backend has API_TOKEN set, paste the same value here so mutating requests (overrides, config save) are authorized.
settings.backupsIntro: Automatic backups created before each install.
settings.failSafeIntro: Import the HA fail-safe package to create input_datetime.solar_optimizer_heartbeat, or pick an existing helper.
settings.pvArraysIntro: Each array is forecast separately (tilt/azimuth/kWp). Set site latitude/longitude in Site & PV.
settings.inverterConnectedHint: Start typing to pick from your Home Assistant entities.
settings.inverterDisconnectedHint: Home Assistant not connected — set the connection above and reload entities for autocomplete.
settings.engineIntro: When goals conflict, highest priority wins. Savings means opportunistic grid use when present — not tariff or time-of-use optimization.
settings.mpcUnavailable: MPC is selected but PuLP is not installed in this image. Rebuild with INSTALL_EXTRAS=1 (default) or install pulp locally. The app is running rules engine fallback.
settings.mlUnavailable: ML load forecasting is enabled but scikit-learn is not available in this image.
settings.temperatureIntro: Models heater/cooler load from outdoor temperature (Open-Meteo forecast + history). Optionally bias-corrected by a Home Assistant sensor.
settings.gridChargeIntro: All listed factors apply each cycle; the engine takes the lowest ceiling. Ramp step limits how fast amps change each cycle.
settings.gridChargeDisabled: Grid charge control is disabled — ramp settings are not used.
settings.advancedRawIntro: Edit any section, including load-shedding tiers. Invalid JSON or schema errors are rejected on apply.
settings.advancedRawWarning: Power-user mode — changes apply immediately without Save.
settings.trainedModelIntro: The learned bias correction and load profile. Export to back up or move to another instance. Importing pauses automatic retraining until you click Retrain.
settings.configBackupIntro: Export or import the full server configuration. Import applies immediately.
settings.restartConfirm: إعادة تشغيل Solar الآن؟ إعدادات وصول الوكيل تُطبَّق عند الإقلاع. قد تنقطع هذه الصفحة مؤقتاً.
settings.restartTimeout: لم تستجب الخدمة بعد إعادة التشغيل — راجع السجلات.
settings.recreateConfirm: إعادة إنشاء الحاوية الآن؟ سيعاد قراءة بيئة المضيف (solar.env). يبقى حجم البيانات.
settings.recreateHelp: استخدم إعادة الإنشاء بعد تعديل solar.env على المضيف.
settings.loadSheddingIntro: Tiered SOC-based switching is configured on the Load shedding tab (separate save).
settings.solcastEnvNote: Solcast credentials (SOLCAST_API_KEY, SOLCAST_RESOURCE_ID) are set via environment or HA add-on options — not stored in this config file.

mcp.envPersistenceNote: في تطبيقات Home Assistant، اضبط MCP من خيارات التطبيق ثم أعد تشغيل التطبيق.
mcp.envPersistenceNoteEditable: فعّل وصول الوكيل أدناه واحفظ. تُكتب التغييرات إلى mcp.env على حجم البيانات — استخدم إعادة تشغيل الخدمة في الشريط أدناه للتطبيق (وليس حفظ الإعدادات).
mcp.pendingRestartBanner: تم الحفظ في mcp.env. استخدم إعادة تشغيل الخدمة في الشريط أدناه للتطبيق.
mcp.tokenConfiguredPlaceholder: الرمز مُعدّ — أدخل قيمة جديدة للاستبدال
mcp.tokenHint: اتركه فارغاً عند الحفظ للإبقاء على الرمز الحالي. يُفضَّل MCP_TOKEN منفصلاً عن API_TOKEN.
mcp.saveSuccess: تم حفظ إعدادات MCP. أعد تشغيل الخدمة للتطبيق.
mcp.tokenGeneratedOnce: تم إنشاء رمز جديد — انسخه الآن؛ لن يُعرض مجدداً.
mcp.lineToolCalls: {count} استدعاء أداة MCP منذ بدء التشغيل.
mcp.lineAuthFailures: {count} فشل مصادقة MCP منذ بدء التشغيل.
mcp.securityIntro: MCP_TOKEN و API_TOKEN يمنحان صلاحيات المسؤول الكاملة. استخدم MCP_TOKEN منفصلاً لإلغاء وصول الوكيل دون تعطيل البرامج النصية. HTTP MCP يقبل رموز Bearer فقط — وليس ملفات تعريف ارتباط جلسة ingress.
mcp.misconfiguredAlert: MCP مفعّل لكن نقطة النهاية HTTP غير مثبتة. في النشر المستقل، عيّن MCP_TOKEN أو API_TOKEN قبل MCP_ENABLED.
mcp.httpIntro: يتصل الوكلاء البعيدون عبر HTTP Streamable برمز Bearer.
mcp.stdioStep1: شغّل المحسّن (مثلاً docker compose up -d solar).
mcp.stdioStep2: عيّن MCP_TOKEN على الحاوية وفي بيئتك المحلية.
mcp.stdioStep3: الصق المقتطف أدناه في تكوين عميل MCP.
mcp.stdioStep4: أعد تشغيل عميل MCP وتحقق من اتصال solar-ai-optimizer.
mcp.docsHint: راجع docs/mcp.md في المستودع للكتالوج الكامل للأدوات.
mcp.haAddonIntro: فعّل MCP وعيّن mcp_token في Home Assistant → الإعدادات → التطبيقات → Solar AI Optimizer، ثم أعد تشغيل التطبيق.
mcp.envVarsIntro: عيّنها في .env أو Docker Compose أو بيئة المضيف، ثم أعد تشغيل الخدمة.
mcp.envApiUrl: عنوان API الأساسي لـ stdio (على المضيف)
mcp.restartNote: أعد تشغيل خدمة Solar بعد التغيير.
mcp.relatedSecurityIntro: رمز API في المتصفح منفصل عن MCP_TOKEN.

validation.gridChargeMinMax: Minimum grid charge amps cannot exceed maximum.

settings.updateVersionAvailable: v{latest} is available — you're on v{current}.
